channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: NACZ Urges Promoters to Delay South African Shows Amid Rising Xenophobic Attacks
item.description: NACZ Urges Promoters to Delay South African Shows Amid Rising Xenophobic Attacks The National Arts Council of Zimbabwe (NACZ) has appealed to local event promoters to consider postponing performances by South African musicians, citing growing public tensions stemming from reporte via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Mt Pleasant Homeless Mother’s Desperate Plea: Multiple Harare men want to have lula lula with me and my 3 daughters
item.description: Harare – A harrowing tale of desperation and vulnerability unfolds in Mt Pleasant, Harare, where a homeless mother, Nyarai Dimingo, 39, is battling to protect her three young daughters from the clutches of sex predators. Her family’s plight, brought to light after seven days of l via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZESA restores power nationwide after fault triggers four-hour blackout @ZESAOfficial
item.description: ZESA said the outage began at 6.24PM when a fault occurred on the Warren-Alaska 330kV line The post ZESA restores power nationwide after fault triggers four-hour blackout appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Pageant empowers people with albinism to stand tall in Zimbabwe
item.description: Xinhua Warm applause echoed through the hall on Saturday night as contestants confidently took to the runway for the Mr and Miss Albinism Zimbabwe pageant. Held in the capital city of Harare, the vibrant event served as a powerful celebration of identity, talent, and resilience. via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZESA Breaks Silence On Fault Behind Zimbabwe’s Nationwide Blackout On Monday Night @ZESAOfficial
item.description: Zimbabwe Went Dark On Monday Night — ZESA Now Explains What Happened ZESA Holdings has finally explained the nationwide blackout that plunged Zimbabwe into darkness on Monday night, 6 July 2026. The power utility said a major electrical fault triggered the collapse, cutting regio via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: PSC rolls out job evaluation reforms to promote fairness & transparency across Public Service @zimsituation

item.title: Bikita Minerals secures US$500m for lithium sulphate plant @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Bikita Minerals secures US$500m for lithium sulphate plant – herald Dr Zhemu Soda George Maponga Masvingo Bureau BIKITA Minerals Sinomine is pressing ahead with plans to value-add its lithium after securing US$500 million in funding for a transformative project that will via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Pipeline upgrade to boost national fuel security @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Pipeline upgrade to boost national fuel security – herald Mr Innocent Chiganze Africa Moyo Deputy National Editor A MAJOR expansion of the country’s fuel pipeline infrastructure is set to boost national fuel security, increase throughput volumes and support economic growt via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: ZETDC restores power @zimsituation
item.description: Source: ZETDC restores power – herald Herald Reporters ZIMBABWE was plunged into darkness last night after a nationwide power outage. The outage, which occurred at about 6.24pm, caught many consumers by surprise as the country has enjoyed stable electricity supplies since July la via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Sibanda, Kafesu crowned Mr, Miss Albinism Zim 2026
item.description: Angela MtombeniENTERTAINMENT WRITER MODEL Thabo Sibanda was crowned Mr Albinism Zimbabwe 2026, while Sithembile Kafesu walked away with the Miss Albinism Zimbabwe... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your c via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Hydro power project secures major deal
item.description: ZIMBABWE renewable energy drive has received a massive boost after the Great Zimbabwe Hydro Power Project secured a 25-year power purchase agreement... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscri via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: It feels like I have lost my future, I thought of dying – Zimbabwean siblings say after being chased out of South Africa
item.description: LORRAINE Ncube (18), one of two Zimbabwean siblings being deported from South Africa in ongoing clampdown on illegal migration, says she feels like her future has been lost. Her brother, Lawrence (16), told South African broadcaster SABC News that he thought of dying when they we via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Winning debut for Zimbabwe ODI captain Ngarava against Bangladesh

item.title: Just grab the US$1,5m offer, Kurai Makore tells Mukanya @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Trust Khosa THOMAS Mapfumo’s nephew, Kurai Makore, has told his uncle to grab the US$1,5 million offer to play at two events in Zimbabwe later this year. Kurai, who is... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
